<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a contractor payment group"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/contractor_payment_groups/{contractor_payment_group_uuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a contractor payment group with all associated contractor payments.

scope: `payrolls:read`

  id={"request"}
